description: This video discusses the Subset Sum problem, demonstrating its NP-hardness through a reduction from the Independent Set problem. The Subset Sum problem involves finding a subset of given positive integers that sums to a target number.
topic_summary: The video covers the NP-hardness of the Subset Sum problem, explaining its relationship to the Independent Set problem and detailing the reduction process. Key concepts include the encoding of graph vertices as integers and the significance of using large numbers in the reduction.
